package repository

import "context"

// UsersRepository is a draft repository boundary for users.
// Keep runtime implementations behind platform repository ports before copying this draft.
type UsersRepository interface {
	List(ctx context.Context, query UsersQuery) ([]User, error)
}

type UsersQuery struct {
	Keywords []string
	Page int
	PageSize int
}
